sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101862" key="sxhmatoqh/kh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σχημᾰτο-θήκη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n101862.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">magazine of gestures</tr_>, of a parasite, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
